name: Chest Dips
setup: Grip parallel bars, arms fully extended
Lean forward ~30 degrees (this targets chest over triceps)
Legs can be bent or straight, feet off the ground
execution: Lower body by bending elbows until upper arms parallel to floor
Elbows track back, not flared out
Push through palms to return to lockout
common_mistakes: Going too deep (shoulder injury risk if not mobile)
cues: Lean forward, look at your knees
Feel the stretch in lower chest
